'''Dolis 3''' was a snowy [[Imperial Remnant]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], in the influence of [[Yaga Minor/Legends|Yaga Minor]].

==Description==
Dolis 3<ref name="Union 1" /> was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] situated in the [[Dolis system/Legends|Dolis system]] of the [[Obtrexta sector/Legends|Obtrexta sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], located at grid square J-3.<ref name="EAOC" /> The world featured an urban environment that experienced heavy snowfall, with flying vehicles passing between towering buildings. Several structures featured snow-covered statues, and slum areas were found on ground level.<ref name="Union 1" />

==History==
[[Chasa]]<ref name="Union 1" /> owned operated [[Chasa's cantina|a cantina]]<ref name="CSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> on Dolis 3. [[Banner Sumptor]]'s team operated for the [[Imperial Remnant]] on the planet, and became stranded after the [[Pellaeon–Gavrisom Treaty|peace accord]] with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. During the announcement of the [[Wedding of Luke Skywalker and Mara Jade|wedding]] of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]], Sumptor ventured to Chasa's establishment, offering [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] to one of the unemployed peoples begging on the snowy streets. He met with [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Derran Takkar]], who planned to disrupt the forthcoming wedding.<ref name="Union 1" />

*[[Union 1|''Union'' 1]] {{1st}}
